articles.author: David J. Lynch
articles.title: Markets begin to react as Trump’s attack on Iran risks hitting American pocketbooks - The Washington Post
articles.description: Oil supplies are vulnerable if conflict escalates.
articles.content: Oil prices rose in Asia on Monday as investors reacted for the first time to the U.S. and Israel-ledconflict in the Middle East. Japans Nikkei 225 stock index, which has been on a months-long tear, w… [+44 chars]
